Your pace traced against the top 5 — or isolate any rival. See a gap? Click any lap — you're in your telemetry via Click-through Telemetry Access™.

The Metric That Changes Everything

RaceCraft Score

Timing sheets measure speed. RaceCraft measures racing. Did you drive smarter than your car was fast? Now there's a number for it.

Where Do You Stack Up?

Fast. Consistent.
Or both?

Every driver in your race, plotted by pace and consistency. Find your quadrant. See who's fast but wild, who's slow but steady — and who's in the zone.

Deep Dive

Stint-level precision.

Every stint broken down — pace curves, fade rates, lap-by-lap timing, and segment breakdowns. Access your telemetry for any lap using Click-through Telemetry Access™.

AI-Powered Analysis

Your AI race engineer.
Available instantly.

Click any stint dot and get a 10-section engineering report — executive summary, run profile, segment breakdowns, tire story, grip events, and prioritized coaching.

Executive Summary & Run Profile

Natural language analysis — handling balance, grip events, consistency. Written like a crew chief debrief, backed by the numbers.

RUN PROFILE
"Inconsistent run with high variation. Car runs tight with 25 grip events. Tire management is a concern — 90°F climb across the run."

Zone-by-Zone Segment Breakdown

Every track segment quartered across the stint. See exactly where time falls off — S3 slowing +0.597s from Q1 to Q4? That's your tire degradation zone.

Q1→Q4 DELTA
S1-0.001s S2+0.522s S3+0.597s Total+1.399s

Tire Temperature Story

Correlation coefficients linking steering input to tire heat. Not guessing — physics. See exactly how your driving creates degradation.

TEMP CORRELATIONS
Entry steering → RF temp: r=0.47
More input = hotter tires = faster fade

Top Coaching Points

Five prioritized takeaways ranked by impact. Specific to your data, your car, your driving — with receipts.

TOP PRIORITY
1
"Tire temps climb 90°F at T1&T2, T3&T4. This heat buildup directly causes late-run fade. Reduce sliding or overdriving."
Competitive Analysis

Head-to-Head.
Pick your rival.

Select any driver from the field. Get a stat comparison, lap-by-lap delta chart, and zone-by-zone segment analysis — see exactly where and why you're faster or slower.

📉

Lap-by-Lap Delta

Green bars = you're faster. Red = they are. Every gap across every shared lap, visualized instantly.

🗺️

Segment Breakdown

Entry, centre, exit at every corner — compared against your rival with color-coded deltas. Know exactly which zones to attack.

Stop Losing Races in Pit Lane

Pit Strategy
Breakdown.

Your 3-lap pit sequence — pit-in, pit-out, first clean lap — compared against every driver who pitted under green. See exactly where you're losing time, ranked against the entire field.

+1.67s
Lost to Field Median
P15 of 21
Pit Stop Ranking
🏎️

Pit-In Lap

How fast you get to pit lane. Your braking point, pit entry speed, and approach compared to the field.

🔧

Pit-Out Lap

The most common place to lose time. Pit exit speed, cold tire management, and rejoining traffic — measured and ranked.

🟢

First Clean Lap

How quickly you get back to race pace. The difference between a good stop and a great one often lives here.

Honor Roll

Awards generated after every race. Who raced the smartest? Who gained the most? Share-worthy moments, backed by data.
